title: MiddleKeyPing
description: Use middle key on mouse to ping
body:
Use the middle mouse button to place a Ping, indicating locations for your friends in multiplayer games.

When the cursor is aimed at a block, a Ping will be created at the corresponding location of the block. When the cursor is aimed at an entity, a Ping will be created above the entity's head.

By default, the middle mouse button creates a Ping that says `Marks a location.`. When pointing at an unfriendly entity, it creates `There are enemy here.`.

Additionally, you can use the numeric keypad keys `1`, `2`, and `3` to create Pings that say `Be careful here.`, `Go here.`, and `There are enemy here.` respectively.

![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/X3RVoddI/images/33fd168c7f7a81ac98e061bc0780636108dc201b.png)
